scripts.content:check: npm run content:validate && npm run content:links && npm run content:index
scripts.foundry:check: npm run module:verify && npm run content:check && npm run assets:verify && npm run journals:build && npm run journals:verify && npm run actors:build && npm run actors:verify && npm run scenes:build && npm run scenes:verify
scripts.release:test: npm run foundry:check && node scripts/dev/verify-release-test-ready.mjs && npm run import:validate
